title: Toast's Better Armor HUD
description: A Texture Pack For A Better Custom Armor HUD! Inspired by the Default Minecraft Textures For Armor.
body:
This Texture Pack Adds Custom Armor HUD! I will be adding more versions regularly. 
All Types With All Color Trims Will Be Added (Copper To Netherite!)

READ THIS: 
These are codes on packs and the format of them. The First Letter Is The Armor Material and Second Is Trim Material

Codes:
N = Netherite,
D = Diamond,
I = Iron,
G = Gold,
C = Chainmail,
Cu = Copper,
L = Lapis Lazuli,
R = Resin,
Rs = Redstone,
E = Emerald,
A = Amethyst,
Q = Quartz

Example: "1.0.0_N-Rs" is the Pack For Netherite Armor With Redstone Trim
